title: aquilegia vulgaris proles viscosa
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris proles viscosa, also known as the sticky or viscid columbine, is a plant species that belongs to the buttercup family and is native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and fight off infections. Aquilegia vulgaris proles viscosa can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its roots and leaves can be used in various medicinal preparations.
